title.description: Erinnya ly’ekikozesebwa eryawereddwa mu mutwe. Ekikozesebwa eky’okufuna ebirungo eby’enjawulo okuva mu bikoni by’ensi yonna.

subtitle.text: Laba ebirungo okuva mu bifo by’ensi yonna
subtitle.description: Ekitundu eky’obulungi ekyawereddwa wansi w’erinnya ly’ekikozesebwa mu mutwe.

heroTitle.description: Ekifaananyi ekikulu ku lupapula lw’ewaka mu kitundu eky’ekibuga.

heroSubtitle.text: Laba ebirungo eby’obulamu eby’amaanyi okuva mu bikoni by’ensi yonna
heroSubtitle.description: Ekitundu eky’obulungi ekyawereddwa wansi w’ekifaananyi ekikulu ku lupapula lw’ewaka.

featuredTitle.description: Ekifaananyi ekyawereddwa waggulu ku kaadi y’ebirungo.

cookingTime.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’okukola ku kaadi y’ebirungo. {minutes} ky’akolebwa n’ennamba y’ebiddaakiika.

difficulty.description: Ekitundu ekyawereddwa nga kibanza ku mutindo gw’obuzibu ku kaadi y’ebirungo.

easy.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’obuzibu ekyegatta ku kirungo ekirina obusanyizo.

medium.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’obuzibu ekyegatta ku kirungo ekirina obuzibu obutono.

hard.description: Ekitundu eky’omutindo gw’obuzibu ekyegatta ku kirungo ekirina obuzibu obunene.

ramenDescription.text: Amayinja ag’amazzi ag’amaanyi agava mu mbuto za nyama y’embuzi n’ennyama eza chashu ezisanyizo, eggi ery’amaanyi, n’ebikadde eby’obulungi.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizaa ya Neapolitan ey’obulamu nga erimu tomato za San Marzano, mozzarella empya, ne basil.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos za nyama y’embuzi ezisanyizo eziri wamu n’epinepuli, cilantro, n’ensigo ku bibbo bya siminti.

butterChickenDescription.text: Ennyama y’inkoko entuufu mu ssupu ey’obutunda n’amafuta n’ebirungo eby’obuwunga.

padThaiDescription.text: Ebikadde eby’obulungi eby’okukola n’ebitookye, tofu, peanuts, n’amayinja ga tamarind.

crepesName.description: Erinnya lya Crepes z’Ebifananyi by’Amawanga g’e Bufalansa.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes ezisinga obulungi ezibadde n’ekyokulya kya Nutella, bisembe eby’obulamu, n’omuwendo gwa whipped cream.
crepesDescription.description: Amagezi ku Crepes z’Ebifananyi by’Amawanga g’e Bufalansa.

label.description: Ekitundu eky’amaanyi eky’okuddamu ku lulimi mu mutwe.

en.description: Ekifaananyi ky’olulimi lw’oluzungu mu kulondoola kw’olulimi.

ja.description: Ekifaananyi ky’olulimi lw’eyapani mu kulondoola kw’olulimi.

es.description: Ekifaananyi ky’olulimi lw’esipanyolo mu kulondoola kw’olulimi.
